title: Hollowed's Discs
description: A resprite of every music disc in the game
body:
# Hollowed's Discs
I retextured every music disc in the game!
---
A lot of people wanted a texture pack for these so I made it one :D

Sometimes it may change if I feel like redoing all or some of the textures.

![All of the discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67c430fa84798593058b2a6eba6fa2cfa84eb65b.png)
